comment.body:
A lot of wisdom from 0mik here, and pills that are big to swallow. So much care ❤️.
 I would add:

 drop all reference to gender, including cute pics, giving airtime of gender comments etc. Proving we're this or that is intensely distracting from the magic of maths, stochastics, and financial mastery in the posts.
 Our greatest women financial folks have noooooothing to prove, and it shows. They bang out phenomenal financials, and by giving absolutely no air time to gender issues (although real, and hurtful when we're on the receiving end) you stop giving it power. As the saying goes, "Be a lion among foxes." It's not easy, and we're here for you. Loving watching you level up!
